error_message: No AMF is associated to the gNB

config_patches.description: From commit e6a97149d5d742ca5c4dff9589507859639e8f82: Fix gNB configuration issue
From commit e6a97149d5d742ca5c4dff9589507859639e8f82: Fix gNB configuration issue

commit.subject: Fix gNB configuration issue
commit.author: Jayasvi Battu <1884596@tcsgenailab.onmicrosoft.com>
commit.body:
Fix gNB configuration issue

Error Message: "No AMF is associated to the gNB"

Applied 0 code patches and 2 config patches.

Selected Patch Details:
- Config: GNB_IPV4_ADDRESS_FOR_NG_AMF (cu_gnb.conf) (cu_gnb.conf)
Description: Must match deployment context value to ensure the gNB can reach the AMF.
- Config: amf_ip_address (cu_gnb.conf) (cu_gnb.conf)
Description: Must match deployment context value to ensure the gNB can reach the AMF.

alternatives.subject: Trigger gNB registration with AMF for monolithic mode
